#  View Commitments 
###### Which type of commitment contract do you want to view?
[Purchase Order](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/view-a-purchase-order)
[Subcontract](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/view-a-subcontract)

title: View Commitments
description: How to view purchase orders and subcontracts for a Procore project using the Commitments tool.
